chunk_id: mineru_book_en_搬书匠-3473-Reactive Programming with RxJS-2015-英文版_page_003_1
text: Every significant shift in software development demands rethinking our approach- es. Real-time and asynchronous web applications pose a huge challenge in web development today. This book does an excellent job explaining how RxJS addresses those challenges and teaches you how to rethink your world in terms of Observ- ables.
